name: component_update
description: Update the operational status of a specific component on a status page. Valid statuses include operational, degraded_performance, partial_outage, major_outage, and under_maintenance.

parameters.name: page_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the status page.

parameters.name: component_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the component to update.

parameters.name: component[status]
parameters.description: New status for the component: operational, degraded_performance, partial_outage, major_outage, under_maintenance.

parameters.name: component[name]
parameters.description: Updated display name for the component.
